x.name: MiniMax
x.bio: Agent: @MiniMaxAgent Token Plan: https://t.co/BDCycxepZw API: https://t.co/fHRdSV7BwZ

tweets.text:
@nvidia @Microsoft Quick clarification on “will it run on my PC?”: M3 is open-weight for local/self-hosted deployment across a range of setups. On consumer hardware, expect quantized runs and reduced context. Full 1M context is server-class.

Weights ship in <10 days, run it and tell us what fits.

We are part of @nvidia and @Microsoft ’s Local LLM lineup at #GTC Taipei.🔥

The PC is being reinvented around local, agentic, open-weight models

MiniMax-M3 is built exactly for this future:
Open-weight.
1M context.
Strong coding.
Native multimodality.

Excited for what comes next!
